scripts.db:generate: pnpm --filter auth db:generate && pnpm --filter incident db:generate && pnpm --filter dispatch db:generate && pnpm --filter analytics db:generate
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter auth db:migrate && pnpm --filter incident db:migrate && pnpm --filter dispatch db:migrate && pnpm --filter analytics db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: pnpm --filter auth db:migrate:deploy && pnpm --filter incident db:migrate:deploy && pnpm --filter dispatch db:migrate:deploy && pnpm --filter analytics db:migrate:deploy
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/sync-envs.mjs && pnpm --filter auth build && pnpm --filter common build && pnpm --filter incident build && pnpm --filter dispatch build && pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter analytics build
